example: Recycling helps reduce waste and protect the environment.
Many trash items end up in a landfill.
We should reduce waste to help the planet.
Protecting the environment is important for future generations.
Please sort your recycling into different bins.
We need to reduce the amount of plastic we use.
Recycling saves natural resources like water and trees.
Plastic can be recycled into new products.
Paper is one of the materials we can recycle.
Glass bottles should be placed in the glass recycling bin.
Recycling helps keep our ecosystem healthy.
Reducing emissions helps fight climate change.
Recycling saves energy compared to making new products.
Recycling programs create jobs in the community.
Small actions like recycling can make a big difference.
